underlying_goal: Migrate the Rails login page from ERB to React/Inertia as part of a rebrand ticket (INT-230), getting it visually correct, functionally working, and through PR review to merge
friction_detail: Multiple rounds needed to fix 'Sign in' text clipping, CORS error from XHR-based Inertia form submission to external auth, and visual mismatches caught by user comparing against production.
brief_summary: User wanted to migrate a login page from ERB to React/Inertia with visual parity; after significant iteration on UI bugs and a CORS issue, the PR went green and was ready to merge.
